scope: Queue Postgres schema and database boundary only; repository SQL port and production cutover remain later tickets.
done: Added QueuePostgresDatabase with DSN and DSN-file support, qmark-to-psycopg placeholder conversion, percent literal escaping, SQLite-like row access, transaction helpers, and advisory locks.
Added Queue Postgres schema baseline covering config plus all active tq_* tables and index families.
Represented queue JSON fields as jsonb and time fields as timestamptz in the Postgres schema.
Added create_queue_database and public database info helpers that do not expose direct DSNs.
Wired queue-service CLI/runtime selection through --db-backend, --postgres-dsn, and --postgres-dsn-file.
Updated Queue health/root/readiness payloads to report selected backend and safe path/source information.
Added psycopg Postgres dependency for the agent runtime.

verification.command: PYTHONPATH=.:../novaic-common python -m pytest tests/test_queue_postgres_boundary.py tests/test_queue_explicit_dependencies.py tests/test_pr344_queue_claim_busy_handling.py tests/test_pr305_task_fsm_store_ledger.py tests/test_pr309_saga_fsm_store_ledger.py tests/test_pr313_worker_lease_ledger.py tests/test_pr235_session_ledger.py tests/test_pr315_queue_fsm_final_residue_guard.py

verification.result: queue-service help includes db-backend, postgres-dsn, and postgres-dsn-file options

verification.command: PYTHONPATH=.:../novaic-common python -m compileall queue_service/db/postgres.py queue_service/db/__init__.py queue_service/db/schema.py queue_service/main.py main_novaic.py

git -C novaic-agent-runtime diff --check -- queue_service/db/postgres.py queue_service/db/__init__.py queue_service/db/schema.py queue_service/main.py main_novaic.py requirements.txt tests/test_queue_postgres_boundary.py

known_gaps: Queue repositories still contain SQLite-specific operational SQL such as datetime(), json_each(), and JSON extraction. That belongs to P074.
No real Postgres service was used in this boundary ticket; tests use fake pool/connection objects to validate schema, configuration, transaction, and secrecy behavior.
No production Queue cutover was attempted; that remains P077.
